reference: Hello Doctor, I am twenty-one years old. I have a cold every morning when I wake up, and as the day goes by, it continues to reduce gradually. This has been happening to me for the past two years. I need some long-term precautions for this. For the past two years, I have been using marijuana daily.
text: Hello, doctor. I am 21 years old. I have a cold every morning when I wake up, and as the day goes by it continues to reduce gradually. This has been happening to me for the past 2 years. I need some long-term precautions for this. For the past 2 years I have been using marijuana daily.
